{{CargoRelic
|name=Xmas Wreath
|class_id=20750
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=One of the three small items for Christmas, decorating it at home not only enhances the festive atmosphere but also protects children from evil.
|fame=14
|art=13
|fth=33
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +6<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
